notes: Purchased vehicles are now delivered straight into the player's garage instead of spawning in front of the buyer (standalone servers keep the spawn, having no vehicle table). Qbox purchases go through qbx_vehicles:CreatePlayerVehicle for a canonical row, then the ZSX_Garages routing columns (parked_state, disabled, is_impounded, impounded_time) are backfilled and the ZSX vehicle cache is refreshed - the car appears in any garage immediately, no relog. Fixes vehicles bought on Qbox never showing up in ZSX_Garages.
